comment: Super convenient spot right next to the metro. Host was quick to respond and the driveway is well-lit. Will book again!
Clean and safe basement parking. Slightly tricky to find the entry the first time, but instructions helped.
Saved me so much time during my daily commute. CCTV and a guard on duty made me feel secure leaving my car all day.
Good value for money near IFFCO Chowk. EV charging was a nice bonus. Would love a covered option next time.
Host Priya is fantastic. Shared a QR pass instantly and even guided me over call. Best parking experience in Gurugram.
Decent spot but the open lot got quite dusty. Fine for a few hours, wouldn't leave the car overnight.
Exactly as described. Shaded, gated and steps from the station. Parkmitter is a lifesaver for daily metro riders.
